title: Supply Chain Manager - MSC India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - MSC India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Join the MSC India family as a Supply Chain Manager in Gwalior. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About MSC India:
MSC India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MSC India!
